title: _is_mesh_uri redundant bracket stripping
description:
File: python/src/lichen/coap/resources.py:81-82

The mesh URI validation strips IPv6 brackets manually:
```python
if host.startswith('[') and host.endswith(']'):
    host = host[1:-1]
```

But urlparse().hostname already returns IPv6 addresses without brackets per RFC 3986. This code path is unreachable and adds dead code.

Example: urlparse('coap://[fe80::1]/path').hostname returns 'fe80::1', not '[fe80::1]'.

Fix: Remove the redundant bracket stripping. If keeping for defensive coding, add a comment explaining why.
